name: Dino Run Game
description: Welcome to Ultimate Dino Run Game, an exciting and addictive dinosaur runner game where you experience a thrilling prehistoric adventure full of speed, challenges, and endless fun. Control a powerful dinosaur, run through dangerous environments, avoid obstacles, collect rewards, and survive as long as possible in this action-packed endless runner game. In this exciting dinosaur running game, your mission is to guide your dinosaur through ancient worlds filled with obstacles, traps, and exciting challenges. Jump over barriers, dodge dangerous objects, and collect coins while running through amazing prehistoric environments.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
